message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Whitesnake Build: Best Moves, Evolution & Guide 2026",
  description: "Master the Bizarre Lineage Whitesnake build with this comprehensive guide for 2026. Learn its moves, optimal setups, and how to evolve it into powerful forms like C-Moon.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/3B82F6/fff?text=Whitesnake+Build+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- Mastering the **Bizarre Lineage Whitesnake build** is crucial for both PvE and PvP dominance.
- Whitesnake is a **Mythical Stand** obtained via Stand Arrows, requiring persistence.
- Optimal builds pair Whitesnake with **Boxing or Hamon** for maximum combo potential.
- Whitesnake can evolve into **C-Moon** by completing the Journey to Heaven questline.
- Always use a **fighting style** and understand Whitesnake's matchups to avoid common mistakes.
</Callout>

In the dynamic world of Bizarre Lineage, choosing and optimizing your Stand is paramount to success. Among the most versatile and powerful Stands is Whitesnake, a mythical entity that forms the foundation for some of the game's most potent evolutions. A well-crafted **Bizarre Lineage Whitesnake build** can dominate both player-versus-environment (PvE) and player-versus-player (PvP) encounters, offering a unique blend of ranged attacks, crowd control, and disabling abilities. This comprehensive guide for 2026 will walk you through everything you need to know about Whitesnake, from acquiring it and mastering its moveset to understanding its best builds and unlocking its incredible evolutionary potential. Prepare to unleash the full power of Whitesnake and ascend to new heights in Bizarre Lineage.

<Section icon={Target} title="Understanding the Whitesnake Stand">

Whitesnake is a highly sought-after Stand in Bizarre Lineage, recognized for its strategic utility and significant damage output. Classified as an S-Tier Stand, it excels across various combat scenarios, making it a cornerstone for many advanced players. Its unique ability to extract discs and disable enemy Stands provides unparalleled control in duels and group fights alike. Knowing its strengths and how to leverage them is the first step towards building an unstoppable character.

<Callout type="tip" title="Evolutionary Potential">
Whitesnake is not just powerful on its own; it serves as a critical prerequisite for evolving into even stronger Stands, specifically **C-Moon** and eventually **Made In Heaven**. Investing in your Whitesnake build now will pay dividends in your future progression.
</Callout>

**Video Highlights:**
- Demonstrates the C-Moon evolution process from Whitesnake.
- Details the specific items and quests required for evolution.
- Showcases C-Moon's full moveset and perks.
- Provides location information for key NPCs.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="5HBS2YWpUVg" title="Bizarre Lineage How To Get C-Moon Stand Fast Progression + Full Guide! (SECRET EVOLUTION)" />

To truly maximize Whitesnake's potential, players must understand its core mechanics and how it interacts with the game's combat system. Its rarity reflects its power, and careful planning is required to obtain and master it.

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="Acquiring the Mythical Whitesnake">

Obtaining Whitesnake is a significant milestone for any Bizarre Lineage player due to its Mythical rarity. Unlike some Stands with specific questlines, Whitesnake is primarily acquired through the use of **Stand Arrows**. This process relies heavily on luck, making it one of the rarer drops in the game. Patience and preparation are key.

<Callout type="warning" title="Mythical Rarity">
Be prepared for multiple attempts when trying to acquire Whitesnake. As a Mythical Stand, its drop rate from Stand Arrows is extremely low. Stocking up on arrows before committing to the grind is highly recommended.
</Callout>

### How to Get Whitesnake

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Gather Stand Arrows">
    Stand Arrows are consumable items used to obtain a random Stand. They can be acquired by completing various quests, participating in events, or sometimes found in chests. Focus on activities that reward Stand Arrows to build up your inventory.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Use Stand Arrows Strategically">
    From your inventory, use a Stand Arrow. The Stand you currently have equipped will be replaced by the new, randomly generated Stand. If you possess a Stand you wish to keep, ensure it is safely stored in your Stand Storage before using an arrow.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Repeat Until Success">
    Due to Whitesnake's Mythical status, it may take numerous attempts to successfully acquire it. Do not be discouraged by initial failures; persistence is rewarded. Each arrow offers a chance, and eventually, Whitesnake will be yours.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="Stand Arrow Sources">
    - **Quests:** Many in-game quests offer Stand Arrows as rewards.
    - **Events:** Seasonal or limited-time events often provide opportunities for Stand Arrow acquisition.
    - **Chests:** Randomly found throughout the world, offering a chance for arrows.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Stand Storage Tips">
    - **Prestige Levels:** Unlock Prestige levels to expand your Stand Storage capacity.
    - **Safeguard Stands:** Always store valuable Stands before attempting to roll for a new one.
    - **Inventory Management:** Keep your inventory organized to easily access Stand Arrows.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Whitesnake's Moveset and Abilities">

Whitesnake boasts a diverse set of moves that make it formidable in combat. Its abilities combine melee attacks, ranged projectiles, and a powerful disabling skill, allowing for varied combat strategies. Understanding each move is essential for executing effective combos and adapting to different opponents.

### Whitesnake's Core Abilities

| Key | Move Name       | Type    | Description             ```
| **E**    | **Barrage**     | Melee   | Rapidly attacks enemies with a flurry of swift, repeated punches.
